meta.title: Block Miner — POL mining game | blockminer.space
meta.description: Free browser mining game on Polygon: build your farm, buy rigs, grow hashrate and earn real POL rewards. Not financial advice.

hero.badge: Live game — blocks are closing now
hero.title: Play the
hero.subtitle: Build your in-game farm, buy rigs, grow hashrate and claim real Polygon (POL) rewards. Free to play in your browser.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps to your first POL reward.
how.step1_body: Register for free, no credit card needed. Your mining dashboard is ready instantly.
how.step2_title: Buy rigs and build your farm
how.step2_body: Purchase miners in the Shop, place them on racks in your rooms and watch your hashrate grow.
how.step3_body: Every ~10 minutes the engine closes a block and splits the reward pool proportionally. Withdraw on-chain when you want.

features.title: Real mining mechanics
features.subtitle: Hashrate, block rounds and rewards run on live server logic — not a slide deck.
features.f1_body: Every ~10 minutes the round closes: your share follows your hashrate vs the global pool.
features.f2_body: In-game POL balance and on-chain withdrawals through Polygon when you are ready.
features.f3_body: Check-in, faucet, shortlinks and offerwalls to boost hashrate or balance while you play.
features.f4_body: Buy miners in the store, manage inventory, global leaderboard and exclusive miner offer events via admin panel.
features.f5_body: Access and refresh tokens, configurable CORS and a separate admin dashboard.
features.f6_body: Mini-games, YouTube rewards, auto-mining GPU and real-time chat (Socket.IO) per client routes.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.heading: Quick answers about Block Miner
faq.a1: Yes. Creating an account and receiving mining rewards is completely free. Buying miners in the shop uses your earned balance.
faq.a2: The simulation uses real Polygon (POL) token addresses. Withdrawal to an on-chain wallet is available for verified balances.
faq.a3: Your share = your hashrate / total network hashrate. Every block the engine computes this ratio and distributes the round reward pool.
faq.a4: The platform is a simulation. Shop purchases cost in-platform POL. No fiat money is required to play.

cta.title: Ready to join the network?
cta.subtitle: Create a free account, connect your Polygon wallet whenever you want, and boost your hashrate with rigs and platform activities.

closing.title: Create your account and mine POL today.
closing.body: The game is live: farm, earn and withdraw on Polygon—no empty hype.

footer.disclaimer: Educational Web3 simulation. Crypto assets carry risk — not financial advice.
footer.tagline: Web3 mining game with a live POL economy.

maintenance.title: Platform in BETA
maintenance.message: We are performing system maintenance and improvements. Temporary instabilities may occur. Thank you for your patience.

login.title: Welcome back!
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue building your mining empire.

errors.identifier_not_found: Email or username does not exist.

register.title: Create your free account
register.subtitle: Join thousands of miners right now.
register.referral_msg: You are being referred by code: {{code}}
register.terms_msg: By registering, you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy.

errors.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.registration_limit_reached: Registration limit reached for this connection.

dashboard.subtitle: Your mining operation is active. Track next block rewards in real-time.
dashboard.no_blocks: Waiting for the first network block...
dashboard.efficiency_msg: Your mining efficiency is 100%. Keep your machines active.

shop.title: Expand your Operation
shop.subtitle: Purchase state-of-the-art equipment and increase your HashRate to mine blocks more efficiently.
shop.confirm_purchase: Do you really want to buy this miner?
shop.how_it_works_msg: When purchasing a miner, it is sent automatically to your inventory. You must install it in a free rack in your data center to start generating POL. Each miner consumes space and energy, make sure you have infrastructure available.

inventory.title: Mining Room
inventory.subtitle: Manage your equipment and maximize your HashRate.
inventory.buy_miners_msg: Buy miners in the shop to get started.
inventory.tip_msg: Tip: Click a free slot to install a machine from your inventory. Elite machines occupy 2 slots.
inventory.max_rooms: You have already unlocked all available rooms.
inventory.insufficient_balance: Insufficient balance to unlock this room.

modal.confirm_remove: Do you want to send this machine back to inventory?
modal.remove_warning: This will send the machine back to inventory and free the rack.
modal.choose_machine: Choose a machine to install in this slot:

inventory.dismantle_rack_tooltip: Remove all machines from this rack to inventory
inventory.dismantle_rack_aria: Dismantle entire rack and send all machines to inventory
inventory.dismantle_rack_confirm: Do you want to dismantle rack {{rack}}?
inventory.dismantle_rack_warning: This will remove all installed machines from this rack and send them back to your inventory.
inventory.slot_empty_tooltip: Empty slot — open to install a machine from inventory

wallet.title: Digital Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Manage your funds and perform On-chain withdrawals.
wallet.withdraw_subtitle: Send your POL directly to your on-chain wallet.
wallet.processing_time: Processing time: Up to {{hours}} business hours.
wallet.invalid_address: Please enter a valid Polygon wallet address (0x...).
wallet.tip_deposit: Deposits are processed instantly after 1 confirmation on the Polygon network.
wallet.deposit_verify_msg: The system verifies on the blockchain in the background. You can close this page — credit is automatic.
wallet.ticket_hint: Deposited POL but balance didn't update? Open a ticket with your transaction hash. Our team will verify on-chain and credit manually.

ccpayment.title: CCPayment (POL)
ccpayment.hint: Permanent deposit addresses use your stable merchant user id BM{yourUserId}-bm (created automatically). Legacy formats BM{userId}-random still work for webhooks.
ccpayment.deposit_panel_hint: Get a Polygon deposit address from CCPayment. Credits apply automatically when CCPayment confirms the payment.
ccpayment.error_load: Could not load CCPayment deposit address.
ccpayment.waiting_hint: After you send POL, balance updates when CCPayment confirms the deposit. This page refreshes periodically while this panel is open.
ccpayment.notify_success_body: Your account was credited with {{amount}} POL via CCPayment.

faucet.title: Equipment Faucet
faucet.subtitle: Earn free miners every 60 minutes. Complete the partner step to unlock your prize.
faucet.cooldown_msg: You have already collected your prize recently. Come back when the timer reaches zero to win again.
faucet.partner_msg: Click the banner below to visit our sponsor and unlock your reward.
faucet.how_it_works_msg: To keep the pool free, we ask you to visit our sponsors. Click the banner, keep the site open for a few seconds, and the claim button will activate automatically.

shortlinks.title: Shortlinks
shortlinks.subtitle: Complete shortened links to earn extra mining power.
shortlinks.wait_reset: Come back tomorrow after daily reset.
shortlinks.reset_in: Next link will be available in:
shortlinks.shortlink_msg: Shortlinks are third-party links that generate revenue for the pool, allowing us to distribute free miners. You must pass through some verification pages (captchas) to complete the link. Upon completion, mining power is added instantly to your inventory.

checkin.title: Daily Check-in
checkin.subtitle: Send the POL payment on Polygon to the official address. The server verifies on-chain — you can leave and come back later.
checkin.reset_in: Your next bonus will be available in:
checkin.link_wallet_hint: Link and verify your wallet on the Wallet page to use check-in.
checkin.link_wallet_first: Link your wallet on the Wallet page first.
checkin.failed_retry: Last attempt failed. Send a new payment or tap “Complete check-in” after fixing.
checkin.unavailable: Check-in is unavailable on the server.
checkin.come_back: Come back tomorrow to keep your streak.
checkin.milestones_sub: Rewards are granted automatically when your streak reaches each day — after a successful daily check-in.
checkin.subtitle_free: Your streak and history are stored on the server. One check-in per calendar day (America/São Paulo).
checkin.free_hint: No POL payment — one tap per day keeps your streak.
checkin.server_note_free: When you reopen the site, streak and history load from the database.
checkin.server_note: The server validates amount, recipient, and sender on-chain. Pending transactions are rechecked automatically in the background.

payment_options.title: Choose Payment Method
payment_options.wallet_desc: Send 0.01 POL from your connected wallet
payment_options.balance_desc: Deduct 0.02 POL from your in-game balance

errors.insufficient_balance: Insufficient balance. You need at least 0.02 POL to check-in with balance.
errors.wallet_not_connected: Wallet not connected. Please connect your wallet first.
errors.already_checked_in: Already checked in today. Come back tomorrow!
errors.verification_failed: Payment verification failed. Please contact support if this persists.

success.wallet_checkin: Check-in confirmed via wallet! +{{streak}} day streak
success.balance_checkin: Check-in confirmed via balance! +{{streak}} day streak

streak_info.streak_reset_warning: Missing a day will reset your streak to 0

powerStats.title: Statistics & Power
powerStats.subtitle: See every source of your hashrate, what is permanent vs temporary, and when boosts expire — so a drop in total power never feels mysterious.
powerStats.load_error: Could not load power statistics. Try again.
powerStats.total_tooltip: Sum of rack machines plus all active temporary boosts.
powerStats.permanent_tooltip: Hashrate from machines installed in your rack (while active).
powerStats.temporary_tooltip: YouTube, minigames, check-in bonuses, Auto Mining GPU — each row expires.
powerStats.no_active_temporary: No active temporary boosts right now.
powerStats.projection_permanent: Permanent baseline stays near {{hr}} H/s while machines stay active.
powerStats.projection_temporary: Temporary layer is {{hr}} H/s until individual expiry times.
powerStats.projection_hint_check_expiry: Watch the countdowns — when temporary power expires, total drops only by that slice.
powerStats.projection_hint_machines: Buying or activating more machines raises the permanent (green) portion.
powerStats.projection_hint_minigames: Minigames and daily check-in add amber boosts with clear expiry dates.

checkin.title: Daily check-in
checkin.bonus_note: Streak milestone hashrate appears as temporary game power until it expires.

other.title: Referrals & events
other.note: Referral or staking hashrate is not stored as a separate bucket in this version. Only real rows in your account are shown above.

network.title: Your rank
network.active_users: Users active in last 24h (heartbeat or login): {{n}}
network.your_share: Your share of that pool snapshot: {{pct}}%

payout.title: Payout mode (not split hashrate)
payout.pol_note: Your hashrate earns POL-style rewards through the main mining flow.
payout.blk_note: When enabled, eligible users share BLK cycles using the same total hashrate snapshot.

analytics.title: Mining log analytics (approximate)
analytics.disclaimer: Values come from mining reward logs (share of simulated block), not a perfect H/s history.

charts.mining_share_note: Each point is the average of your logged share% for that UTC day.
charts.blk_pool_note: Shows recent cycle snapshots (pool hashrate), not your personal curve.

ptc.title: Paid to Click
ptc.subtitle: Earn POL by visiting our partners' websites for a few seconds.
ptc.no_ads: No ads available right now. Check back later!
ptc.wait_msg: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds to claim your reward.

youtube.title: YouTube Rewards
youtube.subtitle: Watch videos from our community and earn HashRate or POL.
youtube.no_videos: No videos available at the moment.
youtube.invalid_url: Invalid YouTube URL or unsupported format.
youtube.video_loaded: Video loaded! Earnings start when you press play.
youtube.embed_hint_before: If Error 153 appears, the creator blocked embed. Click
youtube.embed_hint_after: to watch there and earn normally.

offers.title: Popular Offers
offers.subtitle: Exclusive event miners. Pay with your in-game balance — items go to your inventory.
offers.empty: No active offers right now. Check back soon.
offers.collect_free_desc: You are collecting this machine for free.
offers.confirm_limited_desc: You are about to acquire a limited-time event machine.
offers.confirm_note: The amount will be debited from your balance. The miner appears in Inventory for installation.

calculator.title: Earnings Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Estimate your earnings based on hash rate and current network
calculator.manual_my_hash: Manual value — click "My inventory" to sync
calculator.no_miners: No machines available in the shop.
calculator.results_placeholder: Fill in your hash rate and network hash rate to calculate
calculator.notes_estimate: Estimate does not account for network fluctuations

minerGames.temporary_power_tooltip: Hash rate earned from Arena minigames (Memory Sync, Power Match). It expires after the configured duration and does not replace rack machines.
minerGames.sync_hint: Updates when you finish a game or when bonuses expire.

autoMiningGpuPage.title: Auto Mining GPU
autoMiningGpuPage.subtitle: Earn temporary hashrate every minute. The server validates timing — keep this page open for best results.
autoMiningGpuPage.mode_hint: Choose once per session. Stop the session to change mode.
autoMiningGpuPage.mode_turbo_desc: +20 H/s every 60 seconds after you open the partner banner in a new tab.
autoMiningGpuPage.pause_hint: Timer pauses while the tab is in the background.
autoMiningGpuPage.daily_limit_note: Resets at UTC midnight. Combined Normal + Turbo.
autoMiningGpuPage.no_active_power: No active temporary power from this session.
autoMiningGpuPage.banner_subtitle: Click the banner to open a new tab. Your click is verified server-side.
autoMiningGpuPage.banner_error: Could not load an offer. Retry or check back later.
autoMiningGpuPage.claim_turbo_hint: Open the partner link first, then claim here.
autoMiningGpuPage.legacy_note: Legacy GPU claims (if any) still appear in your total hashrate until they expire.

transparency.page_description: All site expenses open to the community: infrastructure, tooling, marketing and where money is invested.
transparency.footer_note: Values in USD. Period conversions are estimates. Manually updated by the BlockMiner team.
